title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT DIPRO THAR LEH MJA TE INKAWM
content:
261/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 23rd April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO) thar, Pu R. Vanneihtluanga leh Serchhip District-a Mizoram Journalists’ Association (MJA) hruaitute chu DIPRO pisa-ah inkawmin, ram leh hnam tana thawh hona tha zawk neih dan tur an sawi ho.

DIPRO Pu R. Vanneihtluanga chuan media-te chu democracy innghahna lungphum pawimawh em em, a tha zawng leh a chhe zawnga mipuite rilru sukthlek thlenga hruai theitu an nih thu sawiin, mipui hnenah hriatna dik leh rintlâk an thlen a pawimawh hle tih a sawi a.

Khawvel ram ropuite'n media hmanga an hnam hmel leh chanchin an vawrh lar thin dante tarlangin, 'Serchhip District hmasawnna tur leh ram leh hnam tana thil tha tihna kawngah sawrkar leh media-te lungrual taka thawh ho a pawimawh hle a ni' a ti bawk.

Serchhip District MJA aiawhin President Pu Kapliana Pachuau-in lawm luhna thu sawiin, Serchhip district chhunga hmalakna hrang hrangahte mipui leh sawrkar ke tichaktu niturin thawh hona tha tak neih an duh thu an sawi ve bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER HOVIN RUIHHLO CHUNGCHANG MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
260/2026-2027

Vawiin chhun dar 12:00 khan School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana hovin a Office Chamber-ah School Education Department hnuaia State Level Anti-Drugs Committee neih a ni a, ruihhlo laka school naupangte fihlim theih nana hmalak dan tur rel a ni.

He meeting-ah hian ruihhlovin school naupangte a tihbuai dan chungchang zir chianna awm tawhte thlir ho niin ruahmanna siam a ni a. Hmalakna atan School Drug Policy buaipui turin Drafting Committee din a ni.

Ruihhlo laka fihlim lo zirtirtute lakah na taka hma lak a nih tur thu leh school leh a chheh vela ruihhlo ti leh zuarte dim dawi an nih loh tur thu sawi ho a ni a. Ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih natna avanga Mizoram hming mawi lo thin chu zirna hmanga siam that dan tur leh, sawrkar, khawtlang, kohhran leh chhungkua tan ho dan tur ngaihtuah ho a ni. Department hrang hrang, Health & Family Welfare , Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs leh Excise & Narcotics te nen ruihhlo do kawnga thawh ho dan tur rel a ni bawk.

He meeting-ah hian School Education Department, Mizoram Social Defence & Rehabilitation Board, Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs, Excise & Narcotics Department hotute leh Mizoram Teachers Federation hruaitute an tel a ni.

title: MIZORAM POLICE PRESS STATEMENT
content:
37/2026-2027

STATE LEVEL NCORD MEETING

The 12th State Level NCORD Meeting was convened on 22nd  April 2026 at the Secretariat Conference Hall–I, Mizoram New Capital Complex (MINECO), under the chairmanship of the Chief Secretary, Pu Khilli Ram Meena, IAS. The meeting was attended by the Director General of Police, Mizoram, senior State Government officials, Deputy Commissioners, Superintendents of Police of all districts, and representatives from the NCB, Assam Rifles, BSF, SIB, and the Council of Churches in Mizoram.

During the meeting, the Chief Secretary reviewed the Action Taken Report of the 11th State Level NCORD Meeting. The Standard Operating Procedure (SoP) for identifying and declaring Drug-Free Villages in Mizoram was also presented and discussed. Additionally, the 15 Action Points issued during the 9th  Apex Level NCORD Meeting held in New Delhi were deliberated upon.

title: MIZORAM POLICE PRESS STATEMENT
content:
259/2026-2027

STATE LEVEL NCORD MEETING

Nimin April 22, 2026 khan Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena, IAS hovin Secretariat Conference Hall- I, Mizoram New Capital Complex (MINECO)-ah '12th State Level NCORD Meeting' neih a ni. He meeting-ah hian DGP Mizoram, State Sawrkar officer senior te, District zawng zawng a Deputy Commissioner leh Superintendent of Police te, leh NCB, Assam Rifles, BSF, SIB leh Mizoram Kohhran Hruaitute Committee (Council of Churches in Mizoram) aiawhte an tel a ni.

Meeting-ah hian 11th  State Level NCORD meeting-a thutlukna hrang hrang bawhzui a nih dan (Action Taken Report) thlirlet a ni a. Mizoram chhunga 'Drug Free Village' (Ruihlo laka fihlim khua) zawn chhuah leh puan dan tur 'Standard Operating Procedure (SoP)' pawh pharh a ni. Hemi bakah hian New Delhi-a 9th   Apex Level NCORD meeting neih hnua 'Action Point' 15 tarchhuah te pawh chipchiar taka sawiho a ni bawk.

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER-IN SORKAR SCHOOL HMASAWNNA LAWMAWM A TIH THU A SAWI
content:
258/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin khan School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan a office chamber-ah thuchah sawiin Mizoram Board of School Education buatsaih, HSLC Examination 2026 result ruahman lawk anga  tihchhuah a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Zirlai exam hmachhawn mi 18,257 aṭanga za zela 80.31 laiin hlawhtlinna an chang thei leh nikum aia pass percentage a sang a, zaa 80 lai a kai thei chu  lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan kumin HSLC result chhuakah hmasawnna lawmawm tak Govt School-ah a lo lang tiin  nikuma Govt School a pass zaa 68.01 chu kumin hian khumin zaa 72.07 an pass a, Candidate zawng zawng an fail vekna school-ah RMSA School la nei nual mah ila, Govt school tih hmingpu an lang tawh lo leh zaa za an pass vekna school-ah kum dang aia Govt School an lang tam a, Govt School 21 zet an lang chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kan result hian zirlaite tan Govt school a belhtlak tih a rawn tarlang a ni a ti.

Minister chuan kumina result tihchhuah dan chu a lo puanzar tawh angin kum dang aia a danglam thu leh top ten leh Division te an lan tak loh thu te, MBSE website-ah erawhchuan zirlaiten an mark leh percentage an en zung zung theih thu leh hei hi board dang pawhin an kalpui dan a nih thu a sawi a, hei hian a tha zawnga nghawng a neih chhoh zel a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan Zirlai hlawhtlinna chang thar zawng zawngte thinlung taka a lawmpui thu leh an hma lam hunah hlawhtlinna an chan zel theih nan duhsakna sang ber a hlan thu a sawi a. Hlawhtlinna chang zo ta lote pawh beidawng mai lova nasa zawka ṭan la sauh sauh tur leh result lawmawm nei thei ngei turin a  chah a ni.

Minister chuan result a hun taka chhuah a nih theih nana buaipuitu MBSE te, school zirtirtute, zirlai nu leh pate, khawtlang leh zirna kaihhnawiha theih tawp chhuahtute zawng zawng chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Mizoram zirnain hma a sawn zel theih nana theih tawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin zirna kaihhnawiha thawktu zawng zawngte a sawm bawk a ni.

title: 'Kham leh Suar' tih ziaktu Pu Lalrammawia Ngente hnenah Book of the Year 2025 lawmman hlan a ni
content:
258/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin April ni 23, 2026 khan I & PR Auditorium, Aizawl ah Mizo Thu leh Hla Inpui (Mizo Academy of Letters) chuan an pawl din champha lawmna hun an hmang a. Pi Carol VLMS. Dawngkimi, Director, Art & Culture, Government of Mizoram chu khuallian a ni.

Pi Carol VLMS. Dawngkimi, Director, Art & Culture, Government of Mizoram chuan ‘Kham leh Suar’ thawnthu ziaktu Pu Lalrammawia Ngente hnenah Book of the Year 2025 chawimawina thu ziak leh pawisa fai Rs 10000 a hlan a ni. Khual lian hian Dr. Darchuailova Renthlei, Dr. H. Laldinmawia leh Tv Lalrinngheta te lehkhabu a tlangzarh nghal bawk a ni. He huna khual lian Pi Carol VLMS. Dawngkimi chuan Book of the Year 2025 chawimawina dawngtu Pu Lalrammawia Ngente a lawmpui thu sawiin, dawng awm tak tak an awm teuh laia hetiang chawimawina hlu tak dawng thei a awm chu malsawmna leh vanneihna a nih thu a sawi a. Khual lian chuan MAL chu pawl zahawm tak a nih thu leh Art & Culture Department nen pawh an thawhhona leh in zawmna a that thu te, thu leh hla hi mihring nun min siam thatu leh nun kawng dik a min hruaitu niin, khawvel leh India ram sukthlek thlirin, kan hnam nunphung, history bakah thawnthu phuah thar lam pawh kan uar deuh deuh a tul thu sawi bawk.

MAL pawl din champha lawmna hi Prof. RL. Thanmawia, President, Mizo Thu leh Hla Inpui chuan kaihruaiin, Dr. Zoramdinthara, Ziaktu Lian chuan pawl dinhmun leh hnathawh tlangpui tarlangin, kum 2025 chhungin Mizo tawng lehkhabu 223 a chhuah thu te, MAL chuan lehkhabu tha chu tehfung hrang hrang hmang a teh a nih hnuah a tha ber thlan a nih thin thu a sawi a. Thu leh Hla Inpui Joint Headquarters leh Branch atangin report tawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

MAL in Book of the Year 2025 a hlan chhan thuziakah chuan “He lehkhabu hian mihring nun chhungril khawharna leh hmun hlauhawm tak tak a hai lang a, khawtlang nun inthlak meka sual ngaihzamnain nun a tihchhiat dan te, Pathian hmangaihna leh beiseina nungin sual thûk taka tlu tawh pawh a tuam dam theih zia te thiam takin a tar lang a ni. Chuvangin, Thu leh Hla Inpui (Mizo Academy of Letters) chuan kum 2025 chhunga Mizo tawnga chhuak lehkhabu zinga tha ber 'Book of the Year 2025' atan a thlang a ni’ tiin.

Kum 1989 atang a MAL in a hlan tan Book of the Year chawimawina hi tum 37 zet hlan a ni tawh a. Chawhnu programme hi Prof. Rualkhuma Colney, Mizo Thu leh Hla Inpui Vice President chuan kaihruaiin, Dr. Lalthlamuana Ralte buatsaih ‘Tunlai Thiamnain Mizo Thu leh Hlaa Hnuhma a neih Dan’ tih chu zirho a ni bawk.

title: Mizoram Governor Interacts with Shalom Special School Students
content:
36/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026 :Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) today interacted with students of Shalom Special School, Serchhip, at the Durbar Hall of Lok Bhavan in Aizawl. The group is currently undertaking a 10-day study tour from April 13 to 23, organised by the Serchhip Battalion of the Assam Rifles. The itinerary includes visits to Aizawl, Silchar, Shillong and Cherrapunji, aimed at broadening the students’ learning experiences beyond the classroom.

Addressing the gathering, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh lauded the initiative of Assam Rifles as both meaningful and commendable, noting that such exposure plays a crucial role in building confidence and widening perspectives, particularly for specially abled children. He also acknowledged the commitment of teachers, caregivers and parents, whose sustained efforts, he said, form the backbone of the students’ progress. Expressing optimism about the long-term impact of the tour, the Governor said it would contribute positively to the overall development of the students as well as the institution. He further urged the Assam Rifles to continue extending support to the school wherever possible.

The interaction saw the students presenting a token of appreciation to the Governor and sharing their experiences from the tour. A brief overview of the school’s activities and highlights from the trip were also presented during the programme.

Shalom Special School, Serchhip was founded on August 17, 2005, by former Chief Minister Mr. Lal Thanhawla. The foundation stone of its present building was laid in January 2010 by the Governor during his tenure as Eastern Army Commander, with construction later carried out by the 4th Battalion of Assam Rifles under its Military Civic Action programme.

At present, Shalom Special School in Serchhip has an enrollment of 36 specially abled students.

Attachment

title: Officials from Cooperation Department, NABARD and MCAB Meet Mizoram Governor
content:
35/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026 :Officials from the Cooperation Department, the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) and the Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. (MCAB) called on the Governor of Mizoram, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), at Lok Bhavan in Aizawl today. The meeting focused on the recent grant of “Scheduled Bank” status to the Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI). The officials also discussed various developmental initiatives aimed at strengthening the cooperative banking sector and enhancing financial inclusion across the state.

Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh expressed his appreciation for the significant achievement of the Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. in attaining Scheduled Bank status. He noted that once the bank is recognised as a scheduled bank under the Reserve Bank of India, various state government departments will be able to conduct official transactions through it. The Governor reiterated that cooperative banks play a vital role in serving the common people and urged all stakeholders to make every possible effort to further strengthen and develop the institution.

The meeting was attended by Mr. Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, Cooperation Department; Mr. John LT Sanga, Registrar of Cooperative Societies (RCS); Mrs. Pankaja Borah, General Manager, NABARD and from the Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. - Mr. Lalnunsanga, Chairman; Mr. Lalrinchhana, Vice Chairman; Mr. Rosiamliana Ralte, Director; Mr. P. Lalsawmliana, CEO and Mr. Vanlalhriata, Deputy General Manager.

This development marks a new chapter for the banking sector in Mizoram. As notified in the Gazette of India dated April 15, 2026, the Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. has been included in the Second Schedule of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, thereby acquiring Scheduled Bank status.

The Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank was established on July 31, 1982. Currently, the bank operates 35 branches and 45 ATMs across the state. It holds deposits amounting to ₹1,930 crore and has extended loans worth ₹1,272 crore, achieving a Credit-Deposit (CD) ratio of 66%. The bank is among the top performers in terms of loan disbursement in Mizoram’s banking sector.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Catalytic Intervention Plan chungchangah thukhawm
content:
254/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 23rd of April,2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall,Mamit-ah Mizoram District Transformation Programme hnuaia District Catalytic Intervention Plan a hnathawh tur ruahman chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap kaihruaina hnuaiah thlirho a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian PHED, BDO West Phaileng, Fisheries, Agriculture, DRDO, AH& Vety, DUDO, Cooperation Dept, Agriculture leh Sericulture atangin hemi hnuaia hnathawh tur ruahman( project) chungchang sawi zauna neih a ni a, kum 2026-2027 chhunga an hmalak tumna leh harsatna te an tarlang.

District Bawrhsap chuan district hmasawnna leh than zelna atan he hmalakna hi a pawimawh a, line department in an hmachhawp tha taka hlen tur leh a hun taka zo turin a chah.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN  REVIEW MEETING ON CENSUS 2027 NEI
content:
253/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 23rd April 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap leh Principal Census Officer nibawk kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall- ah ' Review Meeting on Census 2027' neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Chhiarpui kalpui mekah dik taka thil engkim lakkhawm a nih theih nan fimkhur a tul hle a ti a. A buaipuitute chu hmaih awm lo tura theihtawp chhuah tura chahin, a bik takin mipuiten hriat thiam loh an neih te pawh tha taka hrilhfiah zel turin a chah a. Chhiarpui 2027 hlawhtling taka peihfel a nih theih nan Field Trainner - te chu Enumerator leh Supervisor - te a tul anga lo buaipui a, an hriatthiam loh te hrilhfiah a, tha taka lo tawiawm thin turin a chah nghal bawk.

Chhiarpui Thawhkhatna hnuaiah hian April ni 1, 2026 atanga April ni 15, 2026 chhung khan mahni inziahluh 'Self-Enumeration' neih a ni a, tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai District chuan 92.82% completion neiin, District zingah - ah a sang ber a ni. April ni 16, 2026 atanga tanin May ni 15, 2026 thleng hian Houselisting and Housing kalpui a ni ang. Lawngtlai District- ah hian House Listing Block - 270 awm in, tun dinhmunah Block - 147 ah Census hi kalpui tan tawh ani.

Vawiin Review Meeting - ah hian Chhiarpui neih meka harsatna awm hrang hrangte sawiho a ni a. Signal awm that lohna khua awm te, Map - a lang chiah lo, a tak a In leh lo awm si, Enumerator- ni mek kum lama upa tawh phone khawih lama harsatna neite an awm thu ngaihthlak a ni a. Harsatna awm hrang hrangte chu sutkian a nih theih nan a theihna kawngah intanpui ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hiah Addl.DC, SDO (Sadar), BDO & Charge Officer, Lawngtlai, Sangau, Chawngte , Bungtlang South, SDC, Field Trainners leh MJA,Lawngtlai aiawh te an tel a,Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar.

title: GYAN BHARATAM MISSION (MIZORAM) CHUNGCHANGAH KOLASIB DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE AN THUKHAWM
content:
251/2026-2027

Kolasib, 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Gyan Bharatam Mission (Mizoram) hnuaia hnam ro hlu (manuscripts) zawn chhuah leh vawn that chungchang ngaihtuahin District Level Committee an thukhawm.

He thutkhawmah hian Central Sawrkar-in India rama state zawng zawng leh district tinah Gyan Bharatam Mission kalpuia, National Manuscript Survey neih tura a ruahman bawhzuiin he thutkhawm hi buatsaih a nih thu tarlan a ni. He mission hnuaiah hian Kolasib District Level Committee (DLC) pawh din a ni a, district chhunga hmalak dan tur tlangpuite sawiho a ni.

Thutkhawm hian Kolasib District-a Gyan Bharatam Mission Nodal Officer atan Pu Chinlianmanga, Election Officer, Kolasib chu a ruat a. Field survey hna lo vil leh buaipuitu (single point of contact) District Coordinator atan Pu Lalremliana, Asst. Professor, Govt. Kolasib College chu ruat a ni bawk.

Gyan Bharatam Mission pawimawhna vantlang mipuiin an hriat chian theih nan leh a tam thei ang ber manuscript lakkhawm a nih theih nan awareness campaign uar taka kalpui nise, tiin an rel a.Kolasib District huamchhunga manuscript zawn chhuah leh lakkhawmte chu District Nodal Officer leh District Coordinator te hriatpuina ngeiin, Gyan Bharatam mobile application hmanga uluk taka document leh geo-tagging ti chunga upload zel turin ruahmanna an siam a ni.

Attachment

title: Cooperation Department, NABARD leh MCAB hotute'n Mizoram Larsap an kawm
content:
251/2026-2027Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Cooperation Department, National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) leh Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank (MCAB) Ltd., hotute chuan Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chu Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah hmuin, tunhnaia "Scheduled Bank" dinhmuna Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank (MCAB) Ltd. hlankai anih chungchang bakah hmalakna dangte an sawipui.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd.-in Scheduled Bank dinhmun pawimawh tak a thleng thei chu a lawmpui thu sawiin, scheduled bank an nih tawh avangin State Sawrkar hnuaia department-te pawhin dan ang taka an dawr theih tawh dawn thu a sawi a. Cooperative Bank-te chu mipui nawlpui tana dawr theih an nih avangin tun aia hmasawn lehzual tura theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Pu Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, Cooperation Department; Pu John LT Sanga, Registrar of Cooperative Societies (RCS); Pi Pankaja Borah, GM, NABARD-te bakah, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. atangin Pu Lalnunsanga, Chairman; Pu Lalrinchhana, Vice Chairman; Pu Rosiamliana Ralte, Director; Pu P. Lalsawmliana, CEO leh Pu Vanlalhriata, DGM te an tel a ni.

Mizoram chuan Banking sector-ah bung thar kaiin tunhnaiah Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. chuan ‘Scheduled Bank’ status a hmu thar a. Gazette of India, April ni 15, 2026-a tarlan a nih danin Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. chu Second Schedule of Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 ah telh a ni dawn ta a ni.

Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. hi July 31, 1982 khan din a ni a. Tun dinhmunah Apex Bank hian branch 35 leh ATM 45 a nei mek a. Deposit cheng vaibelchhe 1930 neiin, loan cheng vaibelchhe 1272 an pe chhuak a, sum dahluh leh loan pek chhuah khaikhinna Credit-Deposit (CD) ratio hi 66% a ni a, Mizorama Bank-te zinga loan pe chhuak tha berte zinga mi a ni mek.

Attachment

title: JEE 2026
content:
250/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026 :JEE 2026 result hmanga Mizoram State Quota Engineering cours hrang hrang dil duhte tan Score Card (Session 1 leh 2 a tih thatna zawk zawk) thehluh theih a ni a, office hun chhungin Technical wing Office, Higher & Technical Education, Chaltlang Lily Veng atanga form la chhuakin Dt. 29.05.2026 tlai dar 4:00 ral hmain thehluh tur a ni e.

title: Mamit-ah TEJAS workshop neih tur chungchangah district level committee thukhawm
content:
249/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 23rd of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan NIC video conferencing room-ah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hoin TEJAS workshop neih tur chungchangah district level committee chu an thukhawm a, workshop hman dan tur kimchang an rel.

TEJAS-Transforming Entrepreneurial Journeys Across States & District hi Start-Up India leh DPITT tangkawpa hmalakna a ni a, a tum ber chu district level-a entrepreneurs len startup te tan mentorship, resource tha leh tanpui an ngaihnaa tanpui te an ni a. Mizoram-ah hian TEJAS awareness program hi Mamit, Hnahthial,Lunglei, Lawngtlai leh Khawzawl district-ah te neih a ni ang.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian awareness program neih hun tur leh tel turte rel a ni a, District Bawrhsap chuan hlawktaka he program hman a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN SENSITISATION PROGRAMME FOR PARENTS OF SPONSORSHIP BENEFICIARIES UNDER MISSION VATSALYA HMANG
content:
248/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Child Protection Unit, Lawngtlai bultumin Mission Vatsalya hnuaia 'Sensitisation Programme for Parents of Beneficiaries' chu LADC Hall- ah neih a ni a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap leh Chairman, SFCAC nibawk chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte chibai bukna a nei hmasa a. Mission Vatsalya- kaltlangin naupang kum 18 hnuailam, tanpui ngaite kawng hrang hranga tanpui an nih thu tarlangin, hei hian naupangte enkawl, humhim, hriselna tha pek leh nun kawng tha zawk zawh tura kaihhruai kawngah rah tha tak a chhuah mek zel a ni, a ti. Nuapang kaihhruai kawngah Nu leh pa te an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, an hlimna, himna, hriselna leh than len kawngah thiam taka enkawl a pawimawh hle tih a sawiin, hemi kawnga thanhnem ngai thar turin a fuih a. Sawrkarin naupangte tan a hmalakna kawng hrang hrang a kalpui mekah Lawngtlai District - ah pawh tha taka kalpui a nih theih nan District Administration chuan theihtawp a chhuah zel tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Sponsorship dawng turte chu uluk taka thlan thin an nih angin, a dawngtute pawhin a hmanna tur dik taka an hman a tul hle a ti a. Tanpuina sum leh pai chu zirna emaw hriselna lam leh damloh nikuaa inentirna atan te a pek a nih angin, a hmanna tur ang taka hmang fo thin turin a chah a. Ho lam taka sum leh pai khawhral a nih loh nan Department hnuaia thawktute chu sponsorship dawngtute vil kawngah tan la thar turin a fuih nghal bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Pi Saimawii Sailo, Protection Officer(NIC) chuan “Mizoram Guidelines for Sponsorship of Children,2017" tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe a, Pi R.Lalnunzawmpuii, Counsellor, chuan “POCSO Act, 2012" leh " Sexual Grooming” tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pein, Pi R.Lalramdinthari, Chairperson, Child Welfare Committee pawhin 'Digital Literacy, Cyber Security,Child Marriage' leh 'Parenting skills' tih thupui hmangin thusawina a nei bawk.

Pu Frankie Vanlalhmangaiha, Social Worker chuan hun kaihruaiin, Pi Mary Lalremruati, District Child Protection Officer (DCPO)  chuan kalkhawmna chibai bukna a nei a. Pu K.Lalliantluanga, Legal cum Probation Officer, chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: MLA Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi MHIP Sub-headquarters Champhai Conference vawi 18-naah khuallian
content:
247/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 23rd April 2026 :Aizawl South III bialtu MLA Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi chuan vawiin khan Thangtea Hall, Champhai Kahrawtah Mizoram Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP) Sub-headquarters Champhai Conference vawi 18-na chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a. MHIP General Headquarters President Pi Lalliani chu khual zahawm a ni.

Khuallian Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi chuan he hun ropui tak a tel thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, MHIP-in an lo dawnsawn dan ropui a tih thu a sawi bawk. MHIP member nih chuan lawm niah te Mizo kawr mawi tak tak kan inbel thin a, a hmuhnawm rual rualin nitin nun, Mizo kawr inbel loh lai pawha MHIP member nihna nena inmil nun mawi leh hawihhawm tak vawng tlat turin mipui te a sawm a, vawiin ni hian hmasawnna a hrin chhuah ngei theih nan kalkhawm te'n thu tha hawna nunpui theuh turin a chah a ni. Mizoramah chuan rawngbawlna a pawimawh a, MHIP member te chuan chhungkuaa rawngbawlna hi an ngaih pawimawh a tul thu a sawi a, fate zirtira kaihhruai that hi khawtlang leh ram tana an thil tih theih hlu ber a ni tih a sawi. Sualna hneh tur chuan mi sualte kan hmangaih hmasak a tul a, hmangaihna atangin tanpui duhna thinlung a chhuak thin tih sawiin kan rama zu leh ruihhlo ngawl veite ngaihvena hmangaih turin a sawm bawk. MHIP hian Mizoram tana a rawngbawlna leh a thil tha tih zawng zawng a chhunzawm zel theih nan duhsakna a hlan a, lawmna thilpek MHIP Sub-headquarters Champhai President hnenah a hlan bawk a ni.

He hun hi MHIP Sub-headquarters Champhai President Pi Lalhmachhuani Varte chuan a kaihruai a, Secretary Pi C. Vanlalruati chuan MHIP thil tih report a pe a, khuallian Pi Lalliani'n thu a sawi bawk. Intihhlimna hun hlimawm tak hman niin MHIP Branch hrang hrang leh zaithiam milar te'n hun an rawn hmang a, chawhnuah Mizoram Journalists Association (MJA) Champhai tanpuinain MHIP Sub-headquarters Champhai hotu thar thlanna hun hman a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in Shalom Special School zirlaite a kawm
content:
246/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 23rd April, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan Shalom Special School, Serchhip zirlaite chu Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah a kawm. Shalom Special School zirlaite hian Serchhip Battalion, Assam Rifles buatsaihin April ni 13-23, 2026 chhung hian Aizawl, Silchar, Shillong leh Cherrapunji-te tlawhin Study Tour an nei a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Assam Rifles-in Shalom Special School, Serchhip zirlaite khawhai tizau tur leh, school hungchhung piaha tawnhriat an neih nan ti a study tour an buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Zirlaite hmangaih taka enkawl thintu zirtirtu leh nu leh pate chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin, tour chuan Shalom Special School leh zirlaiteah hmasawnna rah duhawm tak a thlen ngei a beisei thu a sawi a. Assam Rifles hotute chu an theihna zawn apiangah Shalom Special School ngaihsaka chhawmdawl zel turin a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Shalom Special School zirlaite hian Larsap hnenah thilpek an hlan mai bakah study tour chu nuam an tih thu an thlen a. An School chungchang leh tour hlimthlate thlir ho a ni bawk.

Shalom Special School, Serchhip hi August ni 17, 2005 khan Chief Minister hlui Pu Lal Thanhawla'n a din a. Tuna an school building ni ta sakna tur lungphum hi Mizoram Larsap hian Eastern Army Commander anih lai, January 2010 khan a lo phum sak tawh a; 4th Assam Rifles te'n Military Civic Action kaltlangin an sak sak a ni.

Shalom Special School, Serchhipah hian vohbik zirlai 36 an awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON ‘GYAN BHARATAM MISSION’ MEETING HELD
content:
34/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 23rd April 2026 :The Lawngtlai District Level Committee on ‘Gyan Bharatam Mission’ held a meeting today at the DC Conference Hall. The meeting was chaired by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, Deputy Commissioner of Lawngtlai and Chairman of the District Committee.

In his address, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed gratitude to all committee members present. He highlighted that under the Gyan Bharatam Mission, efforts will be made to preserve manuscripts over 75 years old, covering cultural traditions, customs, and even religious aspects. He emphasized that the government will extend full support in this initiative. He also stated that manuscripts serve as important evidence of historical events and preserving them is of great significance.

He further stressed that in Mizoram, it is crucial to identify and preserve manuscripts left behind by ancestors, which reflect traditional practices and cultural heritage. He noted that not only the government but also organizations and individuals must actively participate in this effort. He urged the committee members and the public of Lawngtlai to make sincere efforts in discovering and preserving such valuable manuscripts.

Shri Lalmuanpuia, Senior Research Officer from the District Art & Culture Office Lunglei gave an overview of the Gyan Bharatam Mission. He mentioned that the mission was announced following the Prime Minister’s address on Independence Day 2025, with the Ministry of Culture serving as the nodal department, while in Mizoram, the Art & Culture Department acts as the nodal agency. He explained that the main objective of the mission is to identify manuscripts older than 75 years across India, digitize them, and make them accessible using modern technology, including Artificial Intelligence. Manuscripts written on materials such as paper, leather, stone, copper, iron, and others will be identified and preserved. At present, over 61,000 manuscripts have already been preserved across India, while Mizoram has around 28 such manuscripts recorded. Further he mentioned that the mission is planned to be implemented over a period of three months, during which an intensive survey will be conducted. A mobile application has also been developed under the mission to enable uploading of manuscript photographs

During the meeting, important matters were discussed. It was resolved that the mission should be effectively implemented in Lawngtlai District, with intensified efforts to identify manuscripts older than 75 years. The Additional Deputy Commissioner has been appointed as the District Nodal Officer-cum-District Coordinator, while Art & Culture Officers from LADC and CADC have been appointed as Assistant Nodal Officers. The responsibility of identifying manuscripts in libraries, archives, educational and religious institutions and private collections within the district has been entrusted to the District Nodal Officer and Assistant Nodal Officers. It was also decided to strengthen awareness and training programmes related to the mission. It was decided that letters will be issued to the Executive Secretaries of LADC and CADC to ensure necessary actions within their jurisdictions.

The meeting was well attended by all members of the District Level Committee, and the session concluded with a vote of thanks from the Chairman,Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON  'GYAN BHARATAM MISSION' THUKHAWM
content:
245/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 23rd April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Level Committee on 'Gyan Bharatam Mission' chuan DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm an nei a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga Lawngtlai bawrhsap leh Chairman, 'Gyan Bharatam Mission' nibawk chuan a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Committee Member kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. Gyan Bharatam Mission hnuaiah hnam ziarâng leh tihphung bakah sakhuana lam thlengin kutziaka awmt kum 75 aia upate vawnthat kalpui a nih tur thu sawiin, hemi kawngah hian sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah tur thu a tarlang a.Hman laia thil thleng, a thleng ngei a ni tih hriatna pawimawh tak chu kutziak a awm thin hi a ni tiin, chutiang ziaka awmte vawn that chu thilpawimawh tak a ni, a ti. A bik takin Mizoramah kan Pi leh puten hnam ziarâng leh kalphunga an lo nei thin ziaka awmte zawn chhuah leh vawn that chu a tul hle nia ahriat thu tarlangin, sawrkar bakah pawl leh mimal ang pawha hmalak a tul dawn hle a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan hnam ziarâng leh kalphung kutziaka awmte zawnchhuah chu ram leh hnam hmangaintute tan tih makmawh a ni tiin, Manuscript - tha leh hlu tak tak zawngchhuak tura theihtawp chhuah turin Commitee Member - te leh Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu Lalmuanpuia, SRO, District Art and Culture Office Lunglei chuan 'Gyan Bharatam Mission' nihphung tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. Kum 2025 Independence Day- a Prime Minister thusawi bawhzuina niin sawrkarlaipuia, Ministry of Culture chu Nodal Deparment an ni, a ti a. Mizoram bikah chuan Art & Culture Department - chu Nodal Agency an ni a ti. Gyan Bharatam Mission- in a tum ber chu India rama kum 75 aia upa manuscript awm ang angte zawn chhuaha, digitised a, tunlai thiamna leh Artificial intelligence - te hmangtangkaia a mamawhtute tana chhawpchhuah a ni, a ti. Paper, savun, lung, copper emaw Iron leh thil danga kutziaka awm, a lo berah kum 75 chunglam te chu zawhchhuah leh vawn that tura hmalak a nih tur thu a tarlang a. Tun dinhmunah India ramah manuscript - nuai sawmruk pakhat aia tam vawnthat a nih tawh thu tarlangin, Mizoram ah chuan sawmhnih pariat vel a a awm a ni, a ti. Gyan Bharatam Mission- chu thla thum chhung kalpui tura ruahman a ni tiin, hemi chhung hian ngawrh taka survey kalpui a ni ang a ti bawk. Gyan Bharatam Mission- hnuaiah hian 'mobile app' siam niin, he application kaltlanga hian thlalak dah luh theih a a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. Lawngtlai District- ah 'Gyan Bharatam Mission' mumal taka kalpui tha ti tlangin, Lawngtlai District chhunga kum 75 chunglam manuscript - awm ang angte zawnchhuah hna chu chak zawka kalpui ni se an ti a. District Nodal Officer -cum- District Coordinator atan Additional Deputy Commissioner ruat niin, Assistant Nodal Officer atan LADC leh CADC - a Art & Culture Officer - te ruat an ni. Lawngtlai District- a Manuscript awm theihna - Library, Archives, Zirna In, Kohhran leh mimal zawnchhuah hna chu District Nodal Officer leh Assistant Nodal Officer - te kutah dah a ni a. Gyan Bharatam Mission- chungchang inzirtirna leh inhrilhhriatna chak taka kalpui ni se an ti a, Executive Secretary, LADC leh CADC henah lehkha pek ni se, a tul angin anmahni huamchhngah hma lo la se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Level Committee on 'Gyan Bharatam Mission' te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: MBSE IN HSLC EXAMINATION RESULT TICHHUAK
content:
244/2026-2027

Aizawl the 23rd April, 2026:Tukin khan Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) chuan MBSE hnuai a High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) Examination result a tichhuak.

Result kimchang hi a hnuaia link dah ah hian en theih a ni.
